para_trans: Extension of time for transfer of Assistant Engineer Grade-II / Branch Engineer / Junior Engineer (Construction).
GOVERNMENT ORDER NUMBER: TRANSFER- 2026 / P.No. 163 / SERVICE-3
Madam Cama Marg, Martyrdom Rajguru Chowk,

In accordance with the provisions of Section 5 (2) (b) of the Maharashtra Regulation and Prohibition of Transfer of Government Employees Act, 2005 and with the approval of the competent authority, the engineers of the following Assistant Engineer Grade-II / Branch Engineer / Junior Engineer (Construction) Cadre of the Public Works Department have been asked to file a Notification in front of their name on their request as well as on the recommendation received. 4 The present office is being extended for administrative reasons up to the date mentioned herein.
